title: Vivian's Horror Spectacular!
description: A horror-themed texture pack that replaces several mobs with creatures from the vast world of horror
body:
During October of 2024, i have been constructing a texture pack that celebrates the vast world of horror. From the big classic horror movies like Friday the 13th to modern indies like Shipwrecked 64, this is a genre that is timeless, and i wanted to dedicate my time to exploring that. Plenty of changes have been made to the vanilla mobs, referencing a variety of horror themes, including mob reskins and remodels, block changes, custom weapon models, and custom sounds, I spared no expense!

Obviously i dont own anything shown here. Credit to these ghouls goes to their original creators, of course. Go support them, no matter how small!

Enjoy my texture pack, and have a Happy Halloween!!!

If you experience any issues with the pack itself, feel free to DM me [here](https://bsky.app/profile/thegayestvivian.bsky.social)
